ValidationRule.description: When Status is moved to In Progress (or beyond) a Default Product Owner is required.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL( Status__c, 'In Progress'), ISPICKVAL( Status__c, 'UAT'), ISPICKVAL( Status__c, 'Hyper care'), ISPICKVAL( Status__c, 'Support'), ISPICKVAL( Status__c, 'Complete') ), ISBLANK(Default_Product_Owner__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To move Status beyond 'In Progress' please assign a Default Product Owner.
